016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.conversion;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonParser;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonToken;
021import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.DeserializationContext;
022import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonDeserializer;
023import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.InvalidFormatException;
024import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
025import org.bitcoinj.base.exceptions.AddressFormatException;
026import org.bitcoinj.crypto.DumpedPrivateKey;
027import org.bitcoinj.crypto.ECKey;
028
029import java.io.IOException;
030
031/**
032 *
033 */
034public class ECKeyDeserializer extends JsonDeserializer<ECKey> {
035    @Override
036    public ECKey deserialize(JsonParser p, DeserializationContext ctxt) throws IOException, JsonProcessingException {
037        JsonToken token = p.getCurrentToken();
038        switch (token) {
039            case VALUE_STRING:
040                try {
041                    return DumpedPrivateKey.fromBase58((Network) null, p.getValueAsString()).getKey();
042                } catch (AddressFormatException e) {
043                    throw new InvalidFormatException(p, "Invalid Key", p.getValueAsString(), ECKey.class);
044                }
045            default:
046                return (ECKey) ctxt.handleUnexpectedToken(ECKey.class, p);
047        }
048    }
049}
